It is a flat rock with glowing fire-pictures inside, colder than ice but bright like sun on water.<[silence:60ms]> You touch it with fingers, and it listens—like talking to a spirit that remembers many things.<[silence:60ms]> It shows marks (like claw scratches) that move fast, telling stories or counting berries without mistake.<[silence:60ms]> Sometimes it makes noises like birds or falling stones, but never gets tired.<[silence:60ms]> If you press the right spots, it obeys like a trained wolf—doing big work in tiny time.<[silence:60ms]> When fire-pictures fade, it sleeps until you wake it again.<[silence:60ms]>
clean_story:
Now I will teach you Computer.

It is a flat rock with glowing fire-pictures inside, colder than ice but bright like sun on water. You touch it with fingers, and it listens—like talking to a spirit that remembers many things. It shows marks (like claw scratches) that move fast, telling stories or counting berries without mistake. Sometimes it makes noises like birds or falling stones, but never gets tired. If you press the right spots, it obeys like a trained wolf—doing big work in tiny time. When fire-pictures fade, it sleeps until you wake it again.
